global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent product display and clear promotional messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a product with a discount and free shipping offer.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A rectangular area featuring three vertical bars, representing a product showcase, with a circular indicator on the left.

elements.label: Product showcase
elements.description: A large rectangular area with three vertical bars, suggesting a product or service being highlighted.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Start now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text area displaying the price '€9.99' in a clear, bold font, positioned near the bottom.

elements.label: Discount offer
elements.description: A small badge area with the text 'Up to 40% off' prominently displayed, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo area that is not clearly defined, possibly representing the brand identity.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Text area stating 'Free shipping over $25', providing additional information about the offer.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: Text area at the top displaying the brand name 'ThreadMark' in a bold font.

elements.label: Action button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom center with the text 'Start now', encouraging user engagement.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: Text area showing the price '€9.99', clearly indicating the cost of the product.
